title: Threads, Atomics, Data Races, and Safe Reclamation · Mastery Check
summary: A safety board presents unfamiliar threads, atomics, data races, and safe reclamation decisions across code, diagrams, diagnostics, and stakeholder evidence; each distractor corresponds to a named misconception. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for threaded lifetime and reclamation proof. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Identify conflicting non-atomic accesses without happens-before ordering as undefined behavior.
Select atomic operations and memory order from a stated synchronization proof instead of folklore.
Publish fully initialized objects with ordering and retain their lifetime until every reader is finished.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Data Race Undefined
steps.instruction:
Order the Data Race Undefined evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Data Race Undefined.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Data Race Undefined assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Data Race Undefined, keep Data Race Undefined connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.

content.text: A quiz native-systems team handles memory case 3491. Produce bounded C evidence to model publication and reclamation state without claiming thread proof; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Identify conflicting non-atomic accesses without happens-before ordering as undefined behavior.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Data Race Undefined has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.
